title: Operator Card Frontmatter
description: Validates optional YAML frontmatter in operator card Markdown files. Existing cards without frontmatter are unaffected — all fields are optional.

card_id.description: Stable slug identifier for this card (e.g. 'fabfilter_pro_q_4').

plugin_id.description: Must match plugin_metadata.schema.json plugin_id when both are set.

display_name.description: Human-readable plugin name for UI display.

risk_level.description: Action-risk level; should match the plugin entry's risk field.

collection.description: ChromaDB collection this card should be ingested into (e.g. 'plugin_operator_index').

source_citations.description: Source document names or URLs referenced in this card.

operator_card_triggers.description: Intent keywords that should surface this card during routing.

parameter_map_file.description: Relative path to the companion JSON parameter map, if one exists.
